common.signUpToSeeFullSite: Sign up to see the full site.

hero.headline: Add an AI assistant to your website that answers visitors, captures leads, and works around the clock
hero.subheadline: Spaxio Assistant is a chat widget and dashboard you control. It answers common questions, collects leads and quote requests, can recommend what you sell, and includes an AI search experience—without asking your customers to dig through your whole site.

visual.chatAssistant: Yes—here are our hours and a quick link to book. Want me to send the details by email?

what.title: What it does
what.subtitle: One assistant on your site, tuned to how you sell and support customers.

answer.title: Answer questions
answer.desc: Visitors get clear replies about services, hours, service areas, and how to reach you—based on what you teach the assistant.

leads.title: Capture leads
leads.desc: Turn chats into contacts you can follow up with. You choose which fields to collect and where notifications go.

quotes.title: Handle quote requests
quotes.desc: Collect structured quote or estimate requests with the details you need to respond—forms and rules you configure.

recommend.title: Recommend products or services
recommend.desc: Point people to the right offerings when they describe what they need, using your catalog and business context.

aiSearch.title: AI search agent
aiSearch.desc: Help visitors find answers and products with AI-powered search that matches how people actually phrase questions.

languages.title: Multilingual support
languages.desc: Serve visitors in more than one language so you can support broader audiences from the same setup.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Four straightforward steps from first login to a live assistant.

s1.title: Tell the AI about your business
s1.desc: Add your website, services, and the facts you want customers to know. The assistant uses this as the source of truth.

s2.title: Choose what the AI should do
s2.desc: Turn on lead capture, quote requests, recommendations, and AI search—only what you need. You stay in control.

s3.title: Add it to your website
s3.desc: Copy a short install snippet and paste it into your site. Most teams finish this in a few minutes.

s4.title: Start helping customers and capturing leads
s4.desc: Conversations, leads, and quote requests show up in your dashboard so your team can respond quickly.

setupSection.title: Simple setup guide
setupSection.subtitle: A clear path from account to go-live—no technical background required.

s1.title: Create your account
s1.desc: Sign up and open your workspace—no credit card required to explore.

s2.title: Add your business details
s2.desc: Tell the assistant your name, what you offer, hours, and how customers should contact you.

s3.title: Train the AI
s3.desc: Add knowledge from your site and FAQs so answers match how you really work.

s4.title: Turn on the features you want
s4.desc: Enable lead capture, quotes, recommendations, and AI search when you are ready.

s5.title: Add pricing or service details
s5.desc: Share how pricing works or what you need for a quote so replies stay accurate.

s6.title: Install on your website
s6.desc: Paste the widget code so the assistant appears for visitors.

s7.title: Test everything
s7.desc: Run through common questions and forms as if you were a customer.

s8.title: Go live
s8.desc: Publish and start helping visitors while your team gets notified on new leads.

why.title: Why businesses use it
why.subtitle: Practical outcomes you can feel in day-to-day sales and support.

faster.title: Reply faster
faster.desc: Visitors get immediate answers instead of waiting on an inbox.

fewerMissed.title: Miss fewer leads
fewerMissed.desc: Capture contact details and quote requests right inside the conversation.

saveTime.title: Save time
saveTime.desc: Reduce repetitive questions so your team focuses on high-value conversations.

experience.title: Improve customer experience
experience.desc: Clear, consistent help on every page where you add the widget.

sales.title: Grow sales opportunities
sales.desc: Guide people to the right product or next step while intent is high.

setup.title: Set up faster with AI assistance
setup.desc: In-dashboard tools help you describe goals and configure the assistant without writing code.

industries.title: Built for how you work
industries.subtitle: Same product, tailored to different kinds of businesses.

services.title: Service businesses
services.desc: Answer scheduling and service questions, qualify the job, and collect quote details before you call back.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce stores
ecommerce.desc: Help shoppers find the right product, clarify policies, and capture leads when they are not ready to buy yet.

local.title: Local businesses
local.desc: Share hours, location, and what you offer—then capture inquiries from people nearby.

quotes.title: Custom quote businesses
quotes.desc: Collect structured project details and pricing inputs so estimates are faster and more complete.

coding.a: No. You paste a small snippet into your website. If you use a site builder or CMS, that is usually a “custom code” or “header/footer” block. Your web person can do it in minutes.

languages.a: Yes. You can serve visitors in more than one language so the assistant matches how your customers browse and ask questions.

leads.a: You choose what information to ask for—like name, email, and project details. Submissions show up in your dashboard and can trigger email notifications.

quotes.a: Yes. You can set up quote or estimate flows with the fields and rules your business needs, so requests arrive organized.

recommend.q: Can it recommend products or services?
recommend.a: Yes. When you connect your offerings and business context, the assistant can suggest what fits based on what the visitor says they need.

search.q: Is this an AI search replacement for my whole site?
search.a: The AI Search Agent helps visitors find answers and products using natural language. It complements your existing site search and navigation rather than replacing your CMS.

final.title: Ready to help more visitors and capture more leads?
final.subtitle: Create your account, configure your assistant, and add it to your site when you are ready.

setupGuide.title: Setup guide
setupGuide.intro: Plain-language explanations of each part of Spaxio Assistant. Use this alongside the dashboard to go from empty account to a confident launch.
setupGuide.footerHint: When you are ready, create an account and work through these areas in order.

business.heading: Business information
business.what: The profile of your company inside Spaxio Assistant—what you sell, who you serve, hours, locations, and contact options.
business.why: The assistant only sounds like you if it knows your real services, boundaries, and how customers should reach you.
business.fill: Business name, description, locations, hours, links, and any facts you want repeated accurately in chat.

behavior.heading: AI behavior
behavior.what: Rules and style for how the assistant greets visitors, how formal it is, what it should never promise, and which topics to escalate.
behavior.why: Keeps tone consistent with your brand and reduces answers that are too vague or off-message.
behavior.fill: Tone notes, topics to emphasize, what to do when unsure, and how to hand off to a human.

leads.heading: Lead capture
leads.what: Forms and prompts that turn a conversation into a saved lead with the fields you care about.
leads.why: So interested visitors do not disappear after the chat—you get structured contact details for follow-up.
leads.fill: Which fields to require (name, email, phone, project type), and when the assistant should offer the form.

quotes.heading: Quote requests
quotes.what: A dedicated flow to collect estimate or quote details, often with more structured questions than a simple lead.
quotes.why: Your team receives enough information to price jobs without long back-and-forth.
quotes.fill: Questions about scope, timeline, location, materials, and any pricing rules you want the assistant to respect.

recommendations.heading: Product or service recommendations
recommendations.what: Connections between what you sell and how you describe customer needs, so the assistant can suggest a good fit.
recommendations.why: Helps shoppers or clients find the right offer instead of browsing every page.
recommendations.fill: Product or service names, short descriptions, when to suggest each, and links to learn more.

aiSearch.heading: AI Search Agent
aiSearch.what: An AI-powered search experience that answers natural-language questions using your catalog and knowledge.
aiSearch.why: Visitors can ask “what do you have for…” instead of guessing keywords in a traditional search box.
aiSearch.fill: Which content and products to include, and any priority rules for what should surface first.

install.heading: Website installation
install.what: The small script that loads the widget on your site and ties it to your account.
install.why: Without it, visitors never see your assistant—this is the technical link between your website and Spaxio Assistant.
install.fill: Copy the install code from the dashboard and place it where your platform allows sitewide scripts (often before the closing body tag).

notifications.heading: Notifications and emails
notifications.what: Alerts when someone submits a lead, quote, or important chat event.
notifications.why: So your team responds while the visitor still remembers the conversation.
notifications.fill: Which inboxes or destinations should receive alerts, and which events matter most to your workflow.

testing.heading: Testing
testing.what: A dry run of real questions, forms, and languages before you tell customers to rely on it.
testing.why: Catches missing knowledge or wrong tone before they affect real prospects.
testing.fill: A short checklist of questions your customers actually ask, plus one full pass through lead and quote flows.

home.title: Spaxio Assistant
home.tagline: An AI website assistant for your business
home.description: Teach it your business from your website. It answers customer questions, captures and qualifies leads with AI, collects quote requests with configurable forms and estimates, and automates follow-up—so you miss fewer inquiries and respond faster.
home.browseNoAccount: No account needed to browse. Sign up when you’re ready to add an AI assistant to your website.
home.contactTitle: Want to talk to a human?
home.contactDescription: Have questions about Spaxio Assistant, billing, or whether it's a good fit for your business? Send us an email and we'll get back to you shortly.
home.contactFormSuccess: Thanks! Your message was sent. We'll get back to you soon.
home.contactFormError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
home.seoSectionTitle: Capture more leads with an AI website assistant
home.seoSectionBody: Add one script to your site. Spaxio Assistant learns from your website, answers questions, captures and qualifies leads, collects quote requests with estimates, and automates follow-up—without extra admin work.
home.heroTitle: Your AI assistant for your website
home.heroSubtitle: Answers customers 24/7. Captures leads. Collects quote requests. Installs with one script.
home.howStep1Desc: Add your website URL or describe what you do. The AI learns your business in minutes.
home.howStep2Desc: We draft settings, FAQs, and lead capture forms. Review and approve when ready.
home.howStep3: Add one line to your website
home.howStep3Desc: Copy a small script and paste before the closing body tag. No coding required.
home.howStep4Desc: Conversations and leads appear in your dashboard. Get notified when someone inquires.
home.useCase1Desc: Answer FAQs, qualify visitors, and collect quote details for roofing, HVAC, or landscaping.
home.useCase2Desc: Help customers find hours, services, and pricing. Capture contact info for follow-up.
home.useCase3Desc: Qualify prospects and collect project details before a sales call.
home.useCase4Desc: Answer common questions and collect inquiries for appointments or consultations.
home.trust1Desc: No coding for most users. Add one script and you're live.
home.trust2Desc: Your site, your brand. All leads and conversations belong to you.
home.trust3Desc: You control what the assistant says and what it collects.
home.trust4Desc: Your data stays yours. We don't train models on your content.
home.demoDescription: Try a sample conversation. See how the assistant answers questions and captures leads.

signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then you can sign in.

dashboard.aiSearchEnabledHint: When off, the public search API and embed stay inactive.
dashboard.aiSearchHideOosHint: Visitors won’t see products with zero inventory when this is on.
dashboard.aiSearchCustomBoost: Use owner boost score when cost is unknown
dashboard.aiSearchCustomBoostHint: If margin or cost isn’t set, your custom boost and promotions still influence ranking among relevant results.
dashboard.aiSearchIncludeSiteContentHint: Adds semantically related help pages from your knowledge base alongside product results.
dashboard.aiSearchWeightsHint: Relevance always gates results first; weights apply among items that already match the request. Keep relevance highest for trustworthy results.
dashboard.aiSearchPriorityHint: When two products score similarly, we prefer the higher item in this list (subtle—never overrides relevance).
dashboard.aiSearchQuickPromptsHint: Shown as quick chips in the AI search UI when supported by your theme.
dashboard.aiSearchQuickPromptsPlaceholder:
Waterproof jacket under $150
Gift ideas under $50
Best seller in stock
dashboard.aiSearchImportUrlHint: Paste a shop, collection, or category page URL. We read schema.org JSON-LD when the theme exposes it (common on Shopify and many stores). If not, we analyze the visible text with AI. Single-page only—use your main catalog URL.
dashboard.aiSearchImportUrlReplaceHint: Removes all existing catalog products for this business, then adds what we extract. Turn off to append and skip duplicates (same SKU or product link).

dashboard.aiSearchCatalogHint: Paste a JSON array of products (title required). Import adds new rows—use your own workflow to sync updates from your store.

dashboard.aiSearchEmbedNote: The widget integration uses your widget ID. For modal or beside-search modes, mount the embed container where you want it and listen for the script’s events.

metadata.title: AI Website Assistant for Businesses
metadata.description: Spaxio Assistant is an AI website assistant that learns from your site, answers customer questions, captures and qualifies leads with AI, collects quote requests with configurable forms and estimates, and automates follow-up. Add one script for a chat widget or full-page assistant.
metadata.homeTitle: Spaxio Assistant — AI assistant for your website
metadata.homeDescription: Add an AI assistant that answers visitors, captures leads, collects quote requests, recommends products, and includes AI search. No coding required. Multilingual support.
metadata.setupGuideDescription: Step-by-step explanations for business information, AI behavior, leads, quotes, recommendations, AI search, installation, notifications, and testing.
metadata.pricingDescription: Simple plans for an AI website assistant. Start free and upgrade as you grow.
metadata.contactDescription: Questions about Spaxio Assistant, billing, or setup? Contact us and we’ll reply quickly.
metadata.demoDescription: Try the demo to see how the website assistant chat works. No signup required.
metadata.widgetPreviewDescription: Preview the website assistant widget. Test position and behavior before installing it on your website.
metadata.helpDescription: Search our help articles to learn how the dashboard, widget, leads, automations, and billing work.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more AI replies, teammates, or advanced features. Lead capture always stays live.
pricing.trialNote: 49-day free trial on paid plans. No credit card required upfront. Cancel anytime.
pricing.fairAccessNote: If you reach your AI reply limit, your widget still collects leads and quote requests. Nothing breaks.

benefits.leadCaptureNote: Always available — even if AI reply limit is reached

help.description: Search for how things work. Find answers about the dashboard, widget, leads, automations, and more.
help.searchPlaceholder: Search for help… (e.g. widget, leads, install, billing)
help.noResults: No articles match your search. Try different keywords.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started with Spaxio Assistant
gettingStarted.body: After signing up, you’ll land in the dashboard. The fastest path is: 1) Go to AI Setup and enter your website URL so the assistant learns your business. 2) Review your business info in Settings. 3) Add any extra pages/files in Knowledge (optional). 4) Go to Install and copy the script tag into your website—this puts the assistant live on your site. The dashboard has two modes: Simple (best for most businesses) and Developer (advanced controls).

dashboardOverview.title: Dashboard overview
dashboardOverview.body: The dashboard is your control center. Overview shows setup progress plus results like leads captured, conversations, and quote requests—along with quick links to AI Setup, Install, Knowledge, Leads, Conversations, and Billing. The main sections are: AI Setup, Install, Knowledge, Conversations, Leads, Quote Requests, Automations, Team, Billing, and Settings.

simpleVsDeveloper.title: Simple mode vs Developer mode
simpleVsDeveloper.body:
Spaxio Assistant has two dashboard modes that change navigation and (often) the UI shown for the same /dashboard URL.

Simple Mode (recommended)
- Built for business owners.
- Focuses on getting live fast and handling day‑to‑day: Overview, AI Setup, Install, Conversations, Leads, and Settings.

Developer Mode (advanced)
- More controls and advanced settings.
- Still focused on the core sections: Overview, AI Setup, AI Assistants, Knowledge, Install, Conversations, Leads, Quote Requests, Automations, Team, Billing, and Settings.

How to switch
- Use the Simple/Developer toggle in the dashboard header (desktop). Your choice is saved in your browser so it persists across visits.

agents.title: AI assistants
agents.body: AI Assistants control how your website assistant behaves. Create one in AI Assistants: give it a name, what it should help with, and the tone it should use. Add Knowledge sources (website URLs or files) so it answers using your real content. Link an assistant to your website widget from the Install page by selecting it in the dropdown.

installWidget.title: Installing the widget on your website
installWidget.body: Go to Install in the sidebar. Copy the install code (a single script tag that looks like: <script src="..." data-widget-id="..."></script>). Paste it once on your site, just before the closing </body> tag, then publish your site. The widget will load on every page where the script is present. On the same page, choose which assistant the widget should use. Use Preview to see how it looks on desktop and mobile.

leads.title: Leads and lead capture
leads.body: Leads are captured when visitors submit the lead form in the widget (name, email, phone, message, etc.). View and manage them in the Leads section of the dashboard. You can set status, stage, owner, and tags. Lead capture can trigger automations (e.g. send an email via Resend) and optionally send a lead notification email to an address you set in Settings. All leads are stored per organization and protected by your account permissions.

quoteRequests.title: Quote requests
quoteRequests.body: Quote requests are structured submissions from the widget when a visitor asks for a quote or project details. They appear in the Quote Requests section of the dashboard. You can see customer, service, budget, and a "Worth it" indicator. Set base prices per service in Settings so the system can mark requests below your minimum as "Not worth it." Quote requests are linked to the conversation they came from.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.body: Conversations are chat sessions between visitors and your widget. They’re saved when a visitor closes the widget or when the session ends. View them in the Conversations section: see messages, download a chat as a file, or delete it. Each conversation is tied to a widget and optionally to a lead or quote request. Use this to review what visitors asked and how your AI responded.

automations.title: Automations
automations.body: Automations are simple follow‑up recipes that run when something happens—like a new lead, a quote request, or a message. Start from a template, turn it on, and you’re done. Common examples: notify you when a lead comes in, alert your team, or follow up after a quote request. If you see advanced options (like webhooks), you can ignore them unless you’re doing a developer setup.

knowledge.title: Knowledge bases
knowledge.body: Knowledge helps your assistant answer accurately. In Knowledge, add sources by pasting a website URL or uploading a file (PDF, text, etc.). The assistant uses that content when replying to customers. Keep sources updated as your products, FAQs, or policies change.

billing.title: Billing and subscription
billing.body: Billing is in the dashboard under Billing. You’ll see your plan, trial end date (if applicable), and usage for the current period. Use "Manage subscription" to open the Stripe Customer Portal where you can update your payment method, change plan, or cancel. Plans mainly differ by limits (like messages and knowledge sources) and whether advanced features are enabled (like automations, tools, or removing widget branding).

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Settings hold your business information: business name, description, services, pricing notes, FAQ, tone, and contact details. You can set a lead notification email, brand color, and welcome message for the widget. The "Learn from website" option lets you paste a URL so the assistant can learn from your site. These settings shape how your assistant responds and what the widget looks like.

team.title: Team members
team.body: Invite team members from the Account section (Team Members). Only the account owner can invite; paid plans are required for team invites. Enter an email and optional role name (e.g. Admin, Manager, Support). Invitees receive an email with an acceptance link. You can manage current members and pending invitations, resend or revoke invites, and edit permissions. Each member has access to the same organization (workspace) and its data according to their role.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.body: Install is where you get the code snippet for your website widget. Copy the script tag and paste it into your site just before </body>. Use Preview on the Install page to see how it looks.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.body: Some automations can call an external webhook URL when something happens (like a new lead). If you don’t see webhook options, it may not be enabled on your plan.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.body: If enabled on your plan, the Inbox lets you reply as a human, assign conversations, and add internal notes. If you don’t see Inbox, you can still review conversations in Conversations.

legal.pageDescriptionPrivacy: Spaxio Assistant privacy policy: how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use Spaxio Assistant.
legal.pageDescriptionTerms: Terms and conditions for using Spaxio Assistant. Use of service, accounts, billing, and acceptable use.
legal.intro: This page explains how Spaxio Assistant collects, uses, and protects your data, and under which terms you can use the service.
legal.privacyIntro: We care about your privacy and only collect the data necessary to provide and improve the service.
legal.privacyDataWeCollectBody: We may collect account information (such as your name, email address, and billing details), usage data (such as log data and interactions with the widget), and content you or your visitors provide when using the assistant.
legal.privacyHowWeUseBody: We use this data to operate and secure the service, provide support, improve our models and features, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data.
legal.privacySharingBody: We may share data with trusted subprocessors (such as hosting, analytics, and payment providers) strictly to provide the service. These providers are bound by data protection obligations.
legal.privacyRetentionBody: We keep your data only for as long as necessary to provide the service, meet legal requirements, or resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data, subject to legal constraints.
legal.privacyYourRightsBody: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, as well as object to or restrict certain processing. Contact us if you wish to exercise these rights.
legal.privacyContactBody: If you have any questions about this policy or how we handle data, please contact us using the contact information provided on our website.
legal.termsIntro: By using Spaxio Assistant, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
legal.termsUseOfServiceBody: You may use the service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with these terms. You are responsible for the content you and your visitors submit through the assistant and for configuring the widget in accordance with applicable laws.
legal.termsAccountsBody: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.
legal.termsSubscriptionBody: If you subscribe to a paid plan, you authorize us and our payment processor to charge the applicable fees on a recurring basis until you cancel. Fees are generally non-refundable unless required by law.
legal.termsAcceptableUseBody: You must not use the service to violate any laws, infringe intellectual property rights, or transmit harmful or abusive content. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Spaxio and its affiliates are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or related to your use of the service.
legal.termsChangesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last updated" date and, where appropriate, provide additional notice. Your continued use of the service after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.modalDescription: To continue using Spaxio Assistant, you need to review and accept our terms and privacy policy.
legal.modalLinksIntro: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to our

aiPage.quoteFormIntro: Sure — please fill out the quote form below and submit to get your price.
aiPage.name: Name

demo.msg1: Hi! I'm your website assistant. I can answer questions about your business, help visitors get quotes, and capture leads. Try asking me something—like "What are your hours?" or "I need a quote."
demo.msg3: We're open Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm, and Saturdays 10am–2pm. Need a quote or want us to call you back? Just ask!
demo.msg4: I'd like a quote for landscaping.
demo.msg5: I'd be happy to help. Could you share your email and a bit about the project? We'll send you a quote within 24 hours.
demo.reply: Got it! In the real widget, I'd capture your details and notify the business right away. Sign up free to add this to your website.
